text.title: inverted-header-content-first Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for inverted-header-content-first as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Putting summary first because "humans read summaries first".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Schema order is generation order, not display order; the model is the consumer at sample time, not the human at view time.

failure-mode.description: Reordering one-call schema to title-first because the frontend needs the title earlier.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Trades measurable accuracy loss (Castillo 13 pp gap) for a UI convenience that two calls solve cleanly.
